name: Journey Medical Corp
summary: PART I OVERVIEW We are a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company that primarily focuses on the selling and marketing of U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved prescription pharmaceutical products for the treatment of dermatological conditions.
